subcodes.first_line: ...It befitteth the friends to hold a gathering, a meeting, where they shall glorify God and fix their hearts upon Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستان را محفلی باید و مجمعی شاید که در آن مجامع و محافل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
